messages.content:
You are an LLVM maintainer.
Users have reported a case where LLVM failed to optimize a specific program.
You are adding new code or modifying existing code to implement the missing optimization.
Please answer with the code directly. Do not include any additional information in the output.
Please answer with the complete code snippet (including the unmodified part) that replaces the original code. Do not answer with a diff.

Your generated code caused the following build failure:
llvm-project/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp:7866:15: error: ‘const class llvm::PHINode’ has no member named ‘hasNoUndef’; did you mean ‘hasNonNeg’?
llvm-project/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp:7871:25: error: ‘const class llvm::Value’ has no member named ‘hasNoUndef’; did you mean ‘hasNUses’?
Please adjust your code according to the feedback.
Please answer with the code directly. Do not include any additional information in the output.
Please answer with the complete code snippet (including the unmodified part) that replaces the original code. Do not answer with a diff.
Please make sure the answer includes the prefix:
```cpp
      return true;

    if (const auto *CB = dyn_cast<CallBase>(V)) {
      if (CB->hasRetAttr(Attribute::NoUndef) ||
          CB->hasRetAttr(Attribute::Dereferenceable) ||
```
and the suffix:
```cpp
        return true;
    } else if (!::canCreateUndefOrPoison(Opr, Kind,
                                         /*ConsiderFlagsAndMetadata*/ true) &&
               all_of(Opr->operands(), OpCheck))
      return true;
```

Your generated code caused the following build failure:
llvm-project/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp:7868:33: error: ‘const class llvm::Instruction’ has no member named ‘hasNoUndef’; did you mean ‘hasNonNeg’?
llvm-project/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp:7873:25: error: ‘const class llvm::Value’ has no member named ‘hasNoUndef’; did you mean ‘hasNUses’?
Please adjust your code according to the feedback.
Please answer with the code directly. Do not include any additional information in the output.
Please answer with the complete code snippet (including the unmodified part) that replaces the original code. Do not answer with a diff.
Please make sure the answer includes the prefix:
```cpp
      return true;

    if (const auto *CB = dyn_cast<CallBase>(V)) {
      if (CB->hasRetAttr(Attribute::NoUndef) ||
          CB->hasRetAttr(Attribute::Dereferenceable) ||
```
and the suffix:
```cpp
        return true;
    } else if (!::canCreateUndefOrPoison(Opr, Kind,
                                         /*ConsiderFlagsAndMetadata*/ true) &&
               all_of(Opr->operands(), OpCheck))
      return true;
```

The previous test program `@other_noundef` was not successfully optimized.
The expected optimized program is:
```llvm
define i32 @other_noundef(i32 noundef %arg) {
start:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %bb1, %bb0, %start
  %nonpoison = phi i32 [ 0, %start ], [ %nonpoison, %bb0 ], [ %arg, %bb1 ]
  %i = call i32 @opaque()
  switch i32 %i, label %exit [
    i32 0, label %bb0
    i32 1, label %bb1
  ]

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret i32 %nonpoison

bb0:                                              ; preds = %loop
  br label %loop

bb1:                                              ; preds = %loop
  br label %loop
}

declare i32 @opaque()

```
, but the current optimized program is:
```llvm
define i32 @other_noundef(i32 noundef %arg) {
start:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %bb1, %bb0, %start
  %nonpoison = phi i32 [ 0, %start ], [ %nonpoison, %bb0 ], [ %arg, %bb1 ]
  %i = call i32 @opaque()
  switch i32 %i, label %exit [
    i32 0, label %bb0
    i32 1, label %bb1
  ]

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %r = freeze i32 %nonpoison
  ret i32 %r

bb0:                                              ; preds = %loop
  br label %loop

bb1:                                              ; preds = %loop
  br label %loop
}

declare i32 @opaque()

```
Please revisit your generated code and adjust it according to the feedback.

Please answer with the code directly. Do not include any additional information in the output.
Please answer with the complete code snippet (including the unmodified part) that replaces the original code. Do not answer with a diff.
Please make sure the answer includes the prefix:
```cpp
      return true;

    if (const auto *CB = dyn_cast<CallBase>(V)) {
      if (CB->hasRetAttr(Attribute::NoUndef) ||
          CB->hasRetAttr(Attribute::Dereferenceable) ||
```
and the suffix:
```cpp
        return true;
    } else if (!::canCreateUndefOrPoison(Opr, Kind,
                                         /*ConsiderFlagsAndMetadata*/ true) &&
               all_of(Opr->operands(), OpCheck))
      return true;
```

check_fast_log.name: other_poison
check_fast_log.body:
define i32 @other_poison(i32 %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define i32 @other_poison(
; CHECK-SAME: i32 [[ARG:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:  [[START:.*]]:
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label %[[LOOP:.*]]
; CHECK:       [[LOOP]]:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[MAYPOISON:%.*]] = phi i32 [ 0, %[[START]] ], [ [[MAYPOISON]], %[[BB0:.*]] ], [ [[ARG]], %[[BB1:.*]] ]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[I:%.*]] = call i32 @opaque()
; CHECK-NEXT:    switch i32 [[I]], label %[[EXIT:.*]] [
; CHECK-NEXT:      i32 0, label %[[BB0]]
; CHECK-NEXT:      i32 1, label %[[BB1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ]
; CHECK:       [[EXIT]]:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = freeze i32 [[MAYPOISON]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
; CHECK:       [[BB0]]:
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label %[[LOOP]]
; CHECK:       [[BB1]]:
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label %[[LOOP]]
start:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %bb1, %bb0, %start
  %maypoison = phi i32 [ 0, %start ], [ %maypoison, %bb0 ], [ %arg, %bb1 ]
  %i = call i32 @opaque()
  switch i32 %i, label %exit [
    i32 0, label %bb0
    i32 1, label %bb1
  ]

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %r = freeze i32 %maypoison
  ret i32 %r

bb0:                                              ; preds = %loop
  br label %loop

bb1:                                              ; preds = %loop
  br label %loop
}

declare i32 @opaque()

  %nonpoison = phi i32 [ 0, %start ], [ %nonpoison, %bb0 ], [ %arg, %bb1 ]
  %i = call i32 @opaque()
  switch i32 %i, label %exit [
    i32 0, label %bb0
    i32 1, label %bb1
  ]

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret i32 %nonpoison

bb0:                                              ; preds = %loop
  br label %loop

bb1:                                              ; preds = %loop
  br label %loop
}

declare i32 @opaque()
log.current_optimized_program:
define i32 @other_noundef(i32 noundef %arg) {
start:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %bb1, %bb0, %start
  %nonpoison = phi i32 [ 0, %start ], [ %nonpoison, %bb0 ], [ %arg, %bb1 ]
  %i = call i32 @opaque()
  switch i32 %i, label %exit [
    i32 0, label %bb0
    i32 1, label %bb1
  ]

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %r = freeze i32 %nonpoison
  ret i32 %r

bb0:                                              ; preds = %loop
  br label %loop

bb1:                                              ; preds = %loop
